Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
Medicare FFS Claims (version L) Codebook │ May 2026 │ V 1.15 
69 
CLM_FROM_DT 
LABEL: 
Claim From Date 
DESCRIPTION: The first day on the billing statement covering services rendered to the beneficiary (aka “Statement 
Covers From Date”). 
SHORT NAME: FROM_DT 
LONG NAME: CLM_FROM_DT 
TYPE: 
DATE 
LENGTH: 
8 
SOURCE: 
NCH 
VALUES: 
— 
COMMENT: 
For home health prospective payment system (PPS) claims, the “from” date and the “thru” date
